name: PopConfirm
description: Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

api.name: PopConfirm
api.description: Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

parameters.name: Placement
parameters.description: Preferred side of the trigger for the confirm popover: "top" (default), "bottom", "left" or "right". Forwarded to the underlying Side.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional leading icon shown beside the title. Supply an IconSource from a Lumeo.Icons pack (e.g. Lucide.TriangleAlert) or from LumeoIcons.

examples.title: Basic Pop Confirm
examples.code:
<PopConfirm Title="Delete this item?"
            Description="This action cannot be undone."
            OnConfirm="@HandleConfirm">
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Delete item</Button>
</PopConfirm>

examples.title: Destructive Action
examples.code:
<PopConfirm Title="Delete account?"
            Description="All data will be permanently removed."
            ConfirmText="Yes, delete"
            IsDestructive="true"
            OnConfirm="@HandleDelete">
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Delete Account</Button>
</PopConfirm>

examples.title: Custom Texts
examples.code:
<PopConfirm Title="Archive project?"
            ConfirmText="Archive"
            CancelText="Keep active"
            OnConfirm="@HandleArchive">
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">Archive Project</Button>
</PopConfirm>

mdSummary:
# PopConfirm

Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pop-confirm

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PopConfirm | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | ConfirmText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | CancelText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | IsDestructive | `bool` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | OnConfirm | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | OnCancel | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | Placement | `string` | `"top"` | Preferred side of the trigger for the confirm popover: "top" (default), "bottom", "left" or "right". Forwarded to the underlying Side. |
| PopConfirm | Icon | `Lumeo.IconSource?` | `` | Optional leading icon shown beside the title. Supply an IconSource from a Lumeo.Icons pack (e.g. Lucide.TriangleAlert) or from LumeoIcons. |
| PopConfirm | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PopConfirm | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (PopConfirm) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnConfirm` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnCancel` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleTriggerKeyDown handles Enter in PopConfirm.razor
- `Space` — HandleTriggerKeyDown handles Space in PopConfirm.razor

## Example
```razor
<PopConfirm />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/PopConfirm/PopConfirm.razor`
